description: Sample weather market inputs for the OTB research-agent hiring case study. This file intentionally includes real OTB market identifiers and full ancillary_data, but does not include gold answers.

market_selection.selection_notes: Recent Wunderground-backed Weather markets processed on 2026-06-01 UTC, plus one May 31 Denver Wunderground market. These examples emphasize station-specific resolution, whole-degree precision, and next-day finality rules.

question_data.title: Will the lowest temperature in Tokyo be 20°C on June 1?
question_data.resolution_conditions: p1: No. p2: Yes. p3: 50/50 outcome. p4: Too Early.

markets.ancillary_data:
q: title: Will the lowest temperature in Tokyo be 20°C on June 1?, description: This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 Jun '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day for the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/jp/tokyo/RJTT.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve until the first data point for the following date has been published on the resolution source.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Revisions to temperatures recorded within this market's timeframe will be considered until the first datapoint for the following date has been published, after which any alterations will not be considered. market_id: 2391835 res_data: p1: 0, p2: 1, p3: 0.5. Where p1 corresponds to No, p2 to Yes, p3 to unknown. This request MUST only resolve to p1 or p2.  Updates made by the question creator via the bulletin board at 0x69c47De9D4D3Dad79590d61b9e05918E03775f24 should be considered.,initializer:f43d55f3a8b7484ed4b6931f93cb6f9ef5dd369d
